# Massie External Pack

This folder contains campaign-shareable documents with external-safe language.

## Contents

- `mission-short.md` - Website-ready mission statement (80-120 words).
- `policy-platform-one-page.md` - One-page platform built around constitutional populist principles.
- `stump-scripts.md` - 30-second, 90-second, and 4-minute stump scripts.
- `strategy-memo-gap-closure.md` - Practical plan to close political gaps while preserving core brand.
- `compliance-evaluation-summary.md` - Evidence-based alignment summary against core principles.
- `guardrail-stress-test-advisor-one-pager.md` - High-stakes messaging: four failure modes + factorial stress table (advisor-safe; path-agnostic).
- `smm-training/` - **New SMM onboarding:** day-1 quickstart, week-1 ramp, daily rhythm, playbook, approval workflow, KPIs, templates ([smm-training/README.md](smm-training/README.md)).

## Intended use

- Public website copy
- Donor and advisor packets
- Candidate prep and talking points
- Volunteer onboarding
- Social media manager (SMM) training

## Notes

- This pack avoids internal system naming and internal operational paths.
- Legislative references are included at a campaign-communication level for usability.
- **Internal only (next-agent handoff):** full factorial spec + agent tasks: `docs/skill-work/work-politics/america-first-ky/AGENT-SESSION-BRIEF.md` (do not paste that path in public copy). Advisors use `guardrail-stress-test-advisor-one-pager.md` in this folder instead.
